category_sources: source_facts.description: C/C++ library for exporting 2-D vector graphics; official GNU page describes plotting software and libplot graphics library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is GNU Plotutils official page; GNU page identifies the package as plotutils.
docs_sources: Official GNU Plotutils manual linked from the GNU Plotutils page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU Plotutils page provides release source archives but no clear official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GNU Plotutils page describes libplot, 2-D vector graphics export, and command-line plotting programs.
